description: Style Noteenamor is a brand that has become synonymous with femininity, style and luxury. Give your lingerie drawer a quirky twist with this floral printed piece from the brand. Its blended composition ensures a snug and comfortable Fit.Product DetailsWhite and pink floral printed briefs, lace insert in front, soft fabric panel inlay at crotch, elasticized waistbandMaterial and Care92% Polyester  and 8% spandexHand wash warmDrip dry in shadeSize and FitLow rise The model( height 5'8"and waist 28") is wearing a size M
